Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. While the patient has several cardiovascular conditions, including coronary atherosclerosis and a history of myocardial infarction, these do not directly indicate a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." The absence of any recorded lipid-related diagnoses or ongoing management of a lipid disorder leads to the conclusion that there is insufficient evidence to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
